---
title: "M2.Ex4: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR)"
format: html
---

## Task 1: YouTube

Your task is to come up with a non-trivial use case for this and implement it.

LangChain offers three integrations with YouTube:

- [YoutubeLoaderDL integration](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/integrations/document_loaders/yt_dlp)
- [YouTube audio integration](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/integrations/document_loaders/youtube_audio)
- [YouTube transcripts integration](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/integrations/document_loaders/youtube_transcript)

However, feel free to use any PyPi package, even if not listed in the LangChain integrations.

See: [YouTube Data API](https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3).

Note: you should handle the case for when the **video has no transcription**, by running [Docling's ASR Pipeline](https://docling-project.github.io/docling/usage/processing_audio_media/).
